prompt: Senior Backend Engineer screening at B2B SaaS (Series C). Candidate is Staff at tiny fintech, ex-Spotify. Key question: is Staff at 20-person startup really Staff? Will they accept Senior title?

assertions.text: Output contains an explicit rating on a defined scale (e.g., 1-5)
Strengths section exists with specific evidence from the resume (not generic)
Gaps section exists distinguishing unknowns from red flags
Risks section addresses title/level concern and startup-to-midsize transition
Includes conditional decision logic (fit if X, not fit if Y)
Interview questions use behavioral format (past behavior, not hypotheticals)
Includes a scoring rubric or evaluation framework for the call
Questions are specifically tied to identified gaps/risks, not generic interview questions
